meta.title: Tax Business Stockholm AB | Accounting office in Solna
meta.description: Accounting office in Solna helping small and medium-sized businesses with bookkeeping, VAT, tax returns, annual accounts, annual reports, payroll and communication with Skatteverket.

home.heroEyebrow: Accounting for Spanish-speaking business owners in Sweden
home.heroTitle: Accounting and tax support in Sweden – explained in Spanish and Swedish.
home.heroText: Tax Business Stockholm AB helps small businesses with bookkeeping, VAT, tax returns, annual accounts, payroll and company registration. We make the Swedish system easier to understand.
home.heroNiche: Hablamos tu idioma. Entendemos el sistema sueco.
home.heroLanguages: Tax Business Stockholm AB · Org.nr 559252-6726 · Solna / Stockholm · Español / Svenska
home.bridgeTitle: A clear link between your business and the Swedish system
home.bridgeText: Running a business in Sweden means dealing with VAT, bookkeeping, tax returns, important dates and communication with Skatteverket. For Spanish-speaking business owners, it is often easier when the rules can be explained in Spanish without losing the precision required in Sweden.
bridgeItems: A letter from Skatteverket you do not understand?
Need help with VAT, invoices or tax returns?
Want to ask questions in Spanish?
home.bridgeClosing: Tax Business explains what needs to be done, why it needs to be done and when.
home.servicesText: Concrete help with receipts, invoices, VAT dates, tax returns, payroll and communication with Skatteverket.
home.languageTitle: For Spanish-speaking business owners in Sweden
home.languageText: Many business owners have good ideas and work hard, but the Swedish system can be difficult to understand at first. It may be VAT, F-tax, tax returns, payroll reports or letters from Skatteverket. At Tax Business you can get help in Spanish, Swedish or English, so you understand what is happening in your company and what you need to do.
home.languagePrimaryText: For business owners who want to understand Swedish accounting, tax and authority routines in Spanish.
home.processText: You do not need to have everything prepared before contacting us.

process.title: You send a request
process.text: Briefly describe what you need help with and which language you prefer.

process.title: We review your needs
process.text: We get back to you with questions or a suggestion for the next step.

process.title: You decide whether to continue
process.text: Contacting us does not commit you to anything.

home.qualityText: Tax Business works close to the client, with clear explanations, careful follow-up and practical support in everyday finances.
quality: Clear information about documents and dates
Contact in Swedish, Spanish or English
Help with letters and questions from Skatteverket
Personal contact with Ana Maria Alvarez
home.pricingText: The need varies depending on documents, VAT period, payroll and the areas you need help with. We review this before the work starts.
home.fitTitle: For smaller businesses that want close contact
home.fitText: Tax Business is for business owners who want to ask questions, understand what is happening and get routines in place around bookkeeping, VAT and tax returns.
home.aboutTitle: A personal accounting office in Solna
home.aboutText: Ana Maria Alvarez runs Tax Business Stockholm AB and works closely with clients in their ongoing finances. She helps business owners organise documents, routines, important dates and communication with authorities.
home.personTitle: Personal contact with Ana Maria Alvarez
home.personText: Ana Maria Alvarez helps business owners with accounting, administration, invoicing and communication with Swedish authorities. Many clients particularly value being able to discuss bookkeeping, tax returns and Skatteverket in Spanish, with the structure and precision required in Sweden.
home.personQuote: My goal is for you to understand what needs to be done, not simply hand over documents.
home.portalTitle: A secure place for your documents
home.portalText: As a client, you will be able to upload accounting documents, receipts and other files through a secure client portal instead of sending sensitive information by email. You can see what you have uploaded, and Tax Business is notified when new material is available.
home.portalNote: The client portal is used to make document handling simpler, safer and easier to follow.
home.portalFeatureOverview: See which documents you have already submitted
home.portalFeatureNotice: Tax Business is notified when new material is available
home.ctaTitle: Would you like to ask about bookkeeping, VAT or tax returns?
home.ctaText: Send a request. Contacting us does not commit you to anything.

items.title: Start a company in Sweden

items.details: We help you get started and keep your company administration organised from the beginning.

items.title: Ongoing bookkeeping and VAT

items.details: We handle the ongoing finances and make the bookkeeping possible to follow.

items.title: Tax returns and annual accounts
items.description: Help when the year needs to be closed and information submitted correctly.
items.details: We help with year-end work, reports and tax returns after the financial year.

items.title: Payroll, invoicing and authority contact
items.description: Support with payroll, employer declarations and practical administration.
items.details: We help with payroll and the information needed for employer declarations.

items.title: Communication with Skatteverket
items.description: Help understanding letters, questions, supplements and important dates.
items.details: We help you understand what the authority is asking for and what documents are needed.

items.title: Invoicing, ROT/RUT and administration
items.description: Support with invoices, documents and routines that make everyday work easier.
items.details: We help with the administration that needs to work continuously in the company.
bullets: Invoicing on your behalf when needed

services.pageTitle: Services for business owners who want order in their finances
services.pageText: Tax Business Stockholm AB helps small and medium-sized businesses with bookkeeping, VAT, tax returns, annual accounts, annual reports, payroll and administration. You can get help in Swedish, Spanish or English.

startCompany.title: Start a company in Sweden with the right routines from the beginning
startCompany.text: Starting a company involves choosing company form, registration, F-tax, VAT and ongoing bookkeeping. We help you understand what needs to be done and in what order.
startCompany.cta: Want to start a company? Contact us and we will go through what you need to do.

about.title: A personal accounting office in Solna
text: Tax Business Stockholm AB is an accounting office in Solna helping small and medium-sized businesses with bookkeeping, VAT, tax returns, annual accounts, annual reports, payroll and administration.

We work in Swedish, Spanish and English. For many business owners, accounting is not only about submitting the right figures, but also understanding what the rules mean in practice. That is why we explain what needs to be done, which dates matter and what documents are needed.

Ana Maria Alvarez runs Tax Business Stockholm AB and works closely with clients in their ongoing finances. She helps business owners organise documents, routines, VAT, tax returns and communication with authorities.
about.caption: Ana Maria Alvarez, accounting economist, Tax Business Stockholm AB

contact.title: Contact Tax Business Stockholm AB
contact.text: Do you have questions about bookkeeping, VAT, tax returns, starting a company or payroll? Send a request and we will get back to you.
contact.response: We will get back to you as soon as we can and explain how we can help.
contact.reassurance: Contacting us does not commit you to anything.

form.name: Name
form.preferredLanguage: Which language would you like us to use?
form.helpWith: What do you need help with?
form.consent: I agree that Tax Business Stockholm AB may contact me about my inquiry.
form.privacy: We use your information only to respond to your request.
form.success: Thank you! We have received your request and will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: Some information is missing. Please check the fields and try again.
form.rateLimit: You have sent several requests in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
text: We use the contact details you submit through the form only to respond to your request.
The information is not sold to third parties and is not used for marketing without your consent.
You can contact us if you want to know what information is stored or request that it is deleted.

portal.title: Client login
portal.intro: Clients can upload accounting documents, receipts and other files for Tax Business Stockholm AB here.
portal.loginText: Enter the email address you use with Tax Business. You will receive a secure sign-in link by email.
portal.loginHelp: If you are already signed in on this device, the portal opens automatically. Otherwise we send a new secure link to the same email address.
portal.linkSent: We have sent a sign-in link to your email.
portal.uploadText: Upload receipts, PDFs, invoices or other accounting documents. Tax Business can see when new material is available.
portal.uploadSuccess: The document has been uploaded and now appears in the list.
portal.empty: No documents have been uploaded yet.
portal.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this document?
portal.notConfiguredText: The portal is built into the website, but it must be connected to Supabase before clients can sign in and upload documents.
portal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact Tax Business.

items.question: Can I get help in Spanish?
items.answer: Yes. Tax Business helps clients in Swedish, Spanish and English.

items.question: Does my company need to be large?
items.answer: No. We work with small and medium-sized businesses.

items.question: Am I committed by contacting you?
items.answer: No. A first request only lets us see what you need help with.

items.question: Can you help with Skatteverket?
items.answer: Yes. We help understand letters, questions, supplements and important dates.

footer.summary: Accounting office in Solna for small and medium-sized businesses that want help in Swedish, Spanish or English.
